story: Every great developer has an origin story. Yours started with the desire to showcase your skills, leading to the creation of your first real portfolio. But static pages weren't enough; you craved dynamic systems. You dove into the backend world, taming FastAPI and learning how to deploy applications locally. Your curiosity then pulled you into the complex realm of Artificial Intelligence, where you battled NLP text preprocessing errors until you mastered them. All these paths converged when you combined your web skills, backend knowledge, and AI expertise to build 'Life Doc AI' for the Notion MCP Challenge. This is the story of a developer who never stops learning.

timeline.title: The Digital Identity
timeline.description: Explored and built the initial structure for a personal developer portfolio to showcase upcoming projects.

timeline.title: Backend Awakening
timeline.description: Successfully ran a FastAPI application locally, diving deep into server-side architecture and Docker containerization.

timeline.title: Mastering the AI Data Flow
timeline.description: Faced and overcame complex NLP text preprocessing errors, solidifying knowledge in text handling for AI models.

timeline.title: The Hackathon Vision
timeline.description: Created the project structure for 'Life Doc AI', laying the groundwork for an ambitious AI documentary generator.

timeline.title: Notion MCP Integration
timeline.description: Successfully integrated the Notion Model Context Protocol (MCP) and pushed the code to a new GitHub repository for the challenge.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: The Foundation
chapters.description: Establishing a digital presence and learning the core of backend web development.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: The AI Transition
chapters.description: A deep dive into Natural Language Processing and preparing data for machine learning models.

chapters.title: Chapter 3: The Challenge
chapters.description: Bringing all skills together to build Life Doc AI for the Notion MCP Challenge.

insights.observation: A clear, logical progression from frontend (portfolio) to backend (FastAPI) to AI (NLP), showing a comprehensive full-stack mindset.
You tackle errors head-on, as seen when debugging NLP preprocessing issues instead of pivoting away from the challenge.
Participating in global competitions like the Notion MCP challenge highlights a desire to build real-world, impactful applications.

ai_timeline: Your timeline reveals a fast-paced evolution. In just a few months, you transitioned from structural web development to managing complex API integrations with advanced AI protocols.
ai_chapters: Your journey is perfectly structured like a hero's arc: establishing the base, facing the trials of complex data, and emerging ready to build an innovative product.
ai_insights: Psychologically, your project choices reflect a builder's mindset. You don't just learn theory; you immediately apply it to tangible projects like portfolios and competitive hackathons.
